name: If There's Any Left, I'll Be Surprised
recipeIngredient: 1 large box instant Chocolate pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, margarine, and chopped nuts. Mix well.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased long cake pan.
3. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30 minutes or until set.
4. Allow to cool completely.
5. In a separate bowl, whip together the Cool Whip, cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until smooth and creamy.
6. Spread the mixture evenly over the cooled crust.
7. Refrigerate for about 1 hour to allow the filling to firm up.
8. Prepare the chocolate pudding according to package instructions.
9. Pour the prepared chocolate pudding over the chilled pie filling.
10. Cover with a container of Cool Whip.
11. Chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
